chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Rulings Regarding Male Slaves and Female Bondwoman

text:
: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَتَزَوَّجُ اَلرَّجُلُ اَلْأَمَةَ بِغَيْرِ عِلْمِ أَهْلِهَا قَالَ "هُوَ زِنًى إِنَّ اَللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ يَقُولُ:
۝ فَانْكِحُوهُنَّ بِإِذْنِ أَهْلِهِنَّ ۝ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4560 - Dawud ibn al-Husayn narrated from Abu al-Abbas al-Baqbaq, who said:
I asked Abu Abdillah (as): "Can a man marry a bondwoman without the knowledge of her owners?"
Imam (as) said: "That is considered fornication. Indeed, Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, says:
'Then marry them with the permission of their owners' (Surah An-Nisa, 4:25)."
